title: BLUELIGHT RAT: YARA Google App C2 Communication
description: Detects BLUELIGHT C2 via Google services using spoofed Firefox UA with Korean language headers (ko-KR). Targets Gmail/Google Account settings to enable IMAP for persistent email exfiltration. Source: Volexity YARA rule APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight_B.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs') and ('Original Log Content' like '%ko-KR,ko;q=0.8,en-US;q=0.5%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%AccountSettingsUi/data/batchexecute%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%SNlM0e%' or ('Original Log Content' like '%mail.google.com%' and 'Original Log Content' like '%GM_ACTION_TOKEN%')) | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Destination Hostname'
falsepositives: Korean-language users browsing Google services with Firefox 80
